description: Personal memory system with curated knowledge and raw chunk storage

features.name: Project scaffolding and SQLite schema
features.description: Set up Python project (pyproject.toml, src/cortex/, tests/). Create the full SQLite schema.
acceptance_criteria: Running pip install -e . from project root succeeds
Importing from cortex.db import init_db works and creates a .db file with all tables
curated_memories table has correct columns and CHECK constraint
curated_memories_fts virtual table exists and indexes content + tags
meta table exists with key-value structure
WAL mode is enabled on the database
